---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for OpenGrowth
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Describe any frustrations or gaps in the current workflow (e.g., CLI limits, dashboard UI, strategy generation logic).

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of the new features or improvements you'd like to see implemented.

## Use Cases & Target Audience

Explain how this feature would be used in practice and which user profiles (developers, marketers, founders) it benefits.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative tools, scripts, or workaround solutions you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, architecture diagrams, or reference specifications here.
